name: SecurityLocalDecryptAES128ECB
title: SecurityLocalDecryptAES128ECB
syntax: long SecurityLocalDecryptAES128ECB(byte key[], dword keyLength, byte cipheredData[], dword cipheredDataLength, byte plainData[], dword plainDataLength)
description: Decrypts ciphered data with a given key using AES128 (ECB), Padding Mode PKCS5.

parameters.name: byte key[]
parameters.description: The key to be used for AES (128 bit).

return: 1: Success. A Value of 1 means that the action was successful.
